message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #888888
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ActorBorderColor #888888
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor "ユーザ" as User
boundary "ブラウザ" as Browser
control "web.php" as Web
control "Kouka1_1Controller" as Controller
boundary "Kouka1_1.index.blade.php" as Index
boundary "layout.kouka1_1.blade.php" as Layout
boundary "components.menu.blade.php" as Menu
boundary "components.subview.blade.php" as Subview

User -> Browser : 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka1_1]
Browser -> Web : GET[/kouka1_1]
Web -> Controller : @index
Controller -> Index
Index -> Layout : @extends
Layout --> Index
Layout -> Menu : @component
Menu --> Layout
Menu -> Subview : @include
Subview --> Menu

@enduml
